description.value: For one reason or another, machines around you often spontaneously break down. Whenever an enemy starts its turn adjacent to you, it must attempt a @Check[fortitude|against:class-spell|options:inflicts:glitching] save against the higher of your class DC or spell DC. On a failure, the target's wielded tech items (or the target itself if it has the tech trait) becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Glitching]{Glitching 1} (@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Glitching]{Glitching 2} on a critical failure) as long as it remains adjacent to you. Regardless of the result of the save, the creature is then temporarily immune to your Malfunction Aura for 24 hours.
